title: aporum litorale
intro: Aporum litorale, also known as the beach coral tree, is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Aporum litorale include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in natural remedies. Aporum litorale can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal and health benefits.
